description.value:
Grox are large, aggressive, reptilian herd beasts found across the Imperium. Bred primarily for food, they are notoriously bad-tempered and dangerous. A charging grox can crush a man in carapace armour.

Tactics: Grox are not intelligent. They charge the nearest threat and attack with horns and trampling hooves. A startled herd stampedes, crushing everything in its path. They are territorial and will attack anyone entering their pen without hesitation.
